title: About
text:
This website features personal projects that utilize knowledge and skills that I gained from 25 years of involvement in research on wildlife ecology (mostly birds) and conservation biogeography. I’m interested in how public datasets can be tapped to answer basic questions about where species occur and changes in landscapes and species distributions.
I carefully consider the spatial extents and resolutions of individual projects as they relate to relevance for human perspectives and decision making, because the results of spatial investigations are often sensitive to the level of analysis. I am primarily focused on the area where I live (Carrboro, NC), but also explore questions at ecoregional, state, and national levels.
Nathan M. Tarr

Use of AI
I use AI tools for convenience and assistance with technical challenges. However, any writing or content on this website has been crafted by me and represents my opinions, judgement, and assessments.

title: Python Notebook Post
text:
This notebook is part of the Patchmosaic Quarto website.

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

data_path = Path('data.csv')
df = pd.read_csv(data_path)
df


df.plot(x='category', y='value', kind='bar', legend=False, title='Values by Category')
